page_content:
Prerequisite: ENME382, ENME473, or ENME690.

ENME788 Seminar (1-3 Credits) First or second semester. Credit in accordance with work outlined by mechanical engineering staff.

ENME799 Master's Thesis Research (1-6 Credits) ENME808 Advanced Topics in Mechanical Engineering (2-3 Credits)

ENME809 Special Topics in Mechanical Engineering (1-3 Credits) Covers current topics in mechanical engineering and related fields. Restriction: Permission of the Mechanical Engineering department. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

ENME898 Pre-Candidacy Research (1-8 Credits) ENME899 Doctoral Dissertation Research (1-8 Credits)
